'''San-lampris''' were skin [[Parasite/Legends|parasites]] which lived on [[Sando aqua monster/Legends|sando aqua monsters]]. They appeared similar to miniature [[Colo claw fish/Legends|colo claw fish]].<ref name="WSW">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
San-pilots first appeared in the [[2001]] reference book ''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' by [[Terryl Whitlatch]] and [[Bob Carrau]].<ref name="WSW" />
